name: Performance Technologies S.A.
summary: Performance Technologies S.A. provides IT Solutions in Greece. The company focus on data center technologies, including servers, storage, networking, and virtualization; hybrid cloud, automation and DevOps; security and information governance; big data and analytics; IT service management/ enterprise service management; service and digital user experience monitoring; and mobility and Internet of Things (IoT). It offers hybrid IT solutions, which include infrastructure, virtualization, data protection, application platforms, DC automation, and cloud solutions; network, mobility and IoT solutions comprising campus networking, DC networks, locations, mobile workplace, and mobile application testing; security and information governance, such as data discovery and classification, encryption and masking, identity and access management, application security, and general data protection regulation; and enterprise service management and DevOps solutions including IT and enterprise service management, business process management, unified operations management, digital experience management, asset management, DevOps and test automation, and process automation. It also offers big data and analytics solutions; and Red Hat and Veritas educational services. Performance Technologies S.A. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
